_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about the history of a special local place and how it has changed over time.

_source.w: We are learning about the history of a special local place and how it has changed over time.
y: Local places hold stories about the people who lived there before us.
Understanding the history of a place helps us see why it matters to the community.
Learning about local sites connects us to the land and the people who have cared for it.
eg: Finding out which Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander group are the Traditional Owners of the land where we live and learn.
Visiting a local park, memorial, or building and learning about its history.
Looking at old and new photos of a local landmark and discussing what changed.
Listening to an Elder or community member share the story of a significant local place.
Drawing a timeline showing how a local site has changed over many years.
Writing about why a local place is important to different people in the community.
